creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch seems to be malformed somehow:

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: distinfo
|===================================================================
|--- distinfo    (revision 378547)
|+++ distinfo    (working copy)
--------------------------
Patching file distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1 with fuzz 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: files/solr.in
|===================================================================
|--- files/solr.in       (revision 378547)
|+++ files/solr.in       (working copy)
--------------------------
Patching file files/solr.in using Plan A...
patch: **** malformed patch at line 15

Also this bug is titled with MAINTAINER prefix while port maintainer
is right now ports@FreeBSD.org. If you want to retake maintainership
please do so in updated patch. Thanks.
